name: Vegetable Stock
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb. old mushrooms, rinsed and quartered
3-4 carrots, rinsed and cut into 2-inch segments
1 baked potato, cut into large chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients to a large stock pot.
2. Pour in enough water to cover the ingredients by 2 inches.
3. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to low and let simmer for 2+ hours.
5. Strain the broth into a smaller pot.
6. Reduce heat and allow to simmer until reduced to about 60% of the original volume, approximately 30-40 minutes.
This is the darkest, best smelling stock I have ever made. I can't wait to try it out.
